title: CVE-2011-0837 — CVSS 4.3 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2011-0837

CVSS Score: 4.3 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2011-04-20T10:55:01.747
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

Unspecified vulnerability in the Agile Technology Platform component in Oracle Supply Chain Products Suite 9.3.0.2 and 9.3.1 allows remote attackers to affect confidentiality via unknown vectors related to Security.

References: http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpuapr2011-301950.html, http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpuapr2011-301950.html
